arts.ttl: John Gilligan steps down from Rangers board as acting chairman exits and a new era begins
arts.sum: Gilligan returned to the frontline when he replaced John Bennett on a temporary basis after the former chairman stepped away

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement proves the Rangers numbers nerds wrong and I see nothing to fear in Europa League last 16 – Barry Ferguson
arts.sum: Barry never put much stock in the stats claiming Ibrox club had next to no chance of finishing in the top eight

arts.ttl: Ridvan Yilmaz in Rangers exit 'talks' as Cyriel Dessers emerges as Serie A replacement favourite - Ibrox transfer latest
arts.sum: Philippe Clement insisted last weekend that Yilmaz wouldn't be leaving the club amid rumours of a return to Turkey

arts.ttl: Clement: Rangers signings necessary but board will decide
arts.sum: Philippe Clement believes it is "necessary" for Rangers to strengthen the squad, but admits he doesn't know if that will happen before the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement admits Rangers NEED new signings for Europa League tilt but decision won't be his
arts.sum: The Ibrox boss wants new faces to boost last 16 chances while there could be more January exits

arts.ttl: Tierney Celtic return could be on THIS week, what next for Gerrard and will Rangers win the Europa League – watch Game On
arts.sum: Join our team every Friday for a mix of serious debate and a lighter look at the major sporting events
